title: LeashedPlayer
description: Now you can use a lead to leash players—or even yourself! Why not try leashing each other and beat Minecraft together? ;)
body:
# Overview
Now you can use a lead to leash players—or even yourself! Why not try leashing each other and beat Minecraft together? ;)

# Features:
1. The lead can be used to leash other players.
2. If you're not leashing any entity, aiming the lead at a fence will leash yourself.
3. Commands are available to obtain and adjust the length of a player's lead.
4. A new game rule allows you to decide whether a leashed player will teleport with the lead holder.

 Get more information, please see the detailed version Page
